channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇷🇺☢️ Russia conducts nuclear warhead transport exercise amid tensions with West
item.description: Russian forces demonstrated movement of nuclear warheads in a three-day exercise, showcasing capability at a time when Moscow describes itself in an existential struggle with the West over Ukraine.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇱🇹 Kremlin calls Lithuanian minister Kaliningrad comments verging on insanity
item.description: Russia sharply criticized Lithuania after its foreign minister said NATO should demonstrate capability to penetrate the Russian exclave of Kaliningrad, calling the remarks "verging on insanity."

item.title: 🛢️📉 Oil prices fall 6% as Trump says Iran negotiations in final stages
item.description: Crude oil dropped sharply after President Trump announced that peace talks with Iran were nearing completion, though markets remain cautious about the outcome.

item.title: 🏛️⚖️ US Senate advances Iran war powers resolution with Republican support
item.description: The Senate moved to limit President Trumps war authority on Iran as four Republicans joined Democrats to advance the measure, marking the first congressional challenge to the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇷🚢 Iran Used Triangular Coercion in Gulf Strategy
item.description: The New York Times examines Irans strategic use of triangular coercion tactics in the Gulf region as tensions with the US and Israel continue.

item.title: 🇮🇷⚠️ Iran Warns of War Beyond Gulf Region if US Attacks Again
item.description: Iran threatens to expand military response beyond the Middle East if the United States resumes attacks, raising fears of broader conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳💰 Chinese investment in Europe surges to 7-year high despite tensions
item.description: Chinese investment in Europe reached its highest level in seven years despite ongoing trade tensions between Beijing and Brussels.

item.title: 🇮🇷🛢️ Over 160 oil tankers stranded in Gulf as Iran tightens Hormuz grip
item.description: More than 160 oil tankers remain stuck in the Gulf region as Iran increases its control over the strategic Strait of Hormuz shipping lane.

item.title: 🇺🇦☢️ Russia arming missile warheads with depleted uranium, Ukraine says
item.description: Ukraines security service claims Russia is equipping missile warheads with depleted uranium, raising concerns about battlefield weapons escalation.

item.title: 🇱🇹🚁 Lithuanian lawmakers shelter as drone incursion halts Vilnius flights
item.description: Lithuanian lawmakers were forced to take shelter and air traffic at Vilnius airport was suspended following a drone incursion, the latest in a series of Baltic security incidents.

item.title: 🇮🇷🏝️ Iran consolidates Strait of Hormuz control with island checkpoints
item.description: Reuters investigation reveals Iran is strengthening its grip on the Strait of Hormuz through island checkpoints and diplomatic agreements with regional partners.

item.title: 🇺🇸🤝 Rubio heads to NATO meeting amid European concerns over US reliability
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is traveling to NATO as European allies express concerns about US troop withdrawals and ongoing commitment to collective defense.

item.title: 🇨🇳✈️ China and US reach limited trade agreements on Boeing jets and beef
item.description: China and the United States reached a limited trade agreement including Boeing jet purchases and beef imports, signaling tentative de-escalation in bilateral relations.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇺🇸 EU reaches deal on US trade pact ahead of Trump tariff deadline
item.description: The European Union finalized a trade agreement with the United States, avoiding threatened tariff increases that were set to take effect in July.

item.title: 🇨🇳✈️ China Confirms 200 Boeing Jet Purchase After Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: China officially confirmed plans to purchase 200 Boeing aircraft and seek an extension of the US tariff truce, following the leaders summit aimed at stabilizing relations.

item.title: 🇪🇺💼 EU Strikes Deal to Finalize US Trade Agreement, Avert Tariffs
item.description: The European Union reached a deal paving the way to finalize a trade agreement with the United States, avoiding potential tariff hikes threatened by the Trump administration.

item.title: 📊📉 Trump Approval Drops to 35% as Republican Support Softens
item.description: President Trumps approval rating fell to 35 percent as support among Republican voters showed signs of softening, according to the latest Reuters/Ipsos poll.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Ukraine Reinforces Northern Border Over Russian Offensive Plans
item.description: Ukraine is reinforcing its northern border region amid intelligence reports of potential Russian offensive operations being prepared.

item.title: 💰🏛️ Fed Minutes Reveal Deep Divisions Over Rate Policy
item.description: Federal Reserve meeting minutes revealed significant divisions among policymakers over interest rate policy as the central bank navigates economic uncertainty.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇮🇱 France Summons Israeli Envoy Over Ben Gvir Flotilla Footage
item.description: France summoned Israels ambassador over controversial footage released by National Security Minister Itamar Ben Gvir showing treatment of Gaza flotilla activists.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇹🇷 Israeli Minister Calls Turkey an Enemy State
item.description: Israels Culture Minister said Israel needs to treat Turkey as an enemy state amid escalating regional tensions and diplomatic disputes.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇷🇺 Baltic Lawmakers Press EU for Firm Support Against Russian Strikes
item.description: Baltic parliamentarians are pressing the European Union for stronger support guarantees as Moscow threatens strikes against countries supporting Ukraine.

item.title: 🇬🇧⛽ UK Eases Russian Oil Sanctions as Fuel Prices Soar
item.description: The United Kingdom has quietly eased some sanctions on Russian oil as domestic fuel prices continue to climb, drawing criticism from Ukraine supporters.

item.title: 🇮🇱⚔️ IDF Brigade Commander Seriously Wounded in Lebanon Drone Strike
item.description: The commander of the IDF 401st Brigade was seriously wounded in a drone strike in southern Lebanon amid ongoing border hostilities.

item.title: 🇱🇹🚁 Lithuania evacuates leaders after drone alert near Vilnius airport
item.description: Lithuanian government leaders were evacuated and Vilnius airport suspended flights following a drone airspace violation alert, underscoring Baltic security concerns.
